positive: A minimalist, stylish graphic featuring a stylized crescent moon rising above a cluster of abstract geometric mountain peaks. The overall aesthetic should be modern Nordic line art combined with bioluminescent elements. Use a limited color palette of deep indigo blue, muted sage green, and creamy gold accents. The design must be centrally composed, optimized for a clean, visible silhouette when printed on fabric. The line work should be crisp and continuous, suggestive of a celestial journey. Atmospheric, highly detailed etching quality, vector illustration style, perfect for apparel.
negative: photorealistic, 3d, noisy, blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, bad anatomy, extra limbs, ugly, low quality
